description: Roadrunner (RUN) is an ATC-20 crypto representing the fastest running flying-capable bird on Earth — the greater roadrunner — reflecting speed, agility, and momentum. Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — RUN gives all holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, driving it forward with unmatched momentum throughout the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Roadrunner
